name: chitter
description: A mock Twitter app built with Express and React.

scripts.install: concurrently --names Backend,Frontend "cd server && npm install" "cd frontend && npm install"
scripts.start:dev: concurrently --names Backend,Frontend "cd server && npm run start:dev" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.start:test: concurrently --names Backend,Frontend "cd server && npm run start:test" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.start:prod: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run start:prod

author: Lewis Bensted
